name: filecubby
description: Owner-operated serverless object storage using Cloudflare KV and Telegram chunks

scripts.dev:pm2: pm2 start pnpm --name filecubby-dev -- run dev

BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token from `@BotFather`. Create a bot in Telegram, copy the token, and send one message to the bot before uploading files.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Private admin bearer token for Filecubby. Generate a long random value, for example with `openssl rand -hex 32`, and store it somewhere private.

CHAT_ID.description: Optional Telegram chat ID saved as a Worker secret/env binding. For a private bot DM, you may leave this blank after sending `/start` to the bot; Filecubby will discover and cache it. Set explicitly for groups, channels, or bots visible in multiple chats.

TASKS.description: KV namespace for background task markers and bootstrap cache. Recommended new namespace name: `filecubby-tasks`.

USERS.description: KV namespace for Filecubby service-token metadata. Recommended new namespace name: `filecubby-users`.

FILES.description: KV namespace for object metadata. Recommended new namespace name: `filecubby-files`.

FILE_DOWNLOAD_INFO.description: KV namespace for cached Telegram file download metadata. Recommended new namespace name: `filecubby-download-info`.

ANALYTICS_ENGINE.description: Analytics Engine dataset for request and transfer telemetry.
